description: Futures-focused prop firm. Trading Combine evaluation. End-of-day trailing drawdown.

rules.description: Intraday loss cap. Resets at 5:00 PM CT daily. Includes realized + unrealized P/L. Breaching causes automatic liquidation of all positions and cancellation of pending orders. NOT a rule violation — account remains eligible for funding, trading resumes next session.

END-OF-DAY trailing drawdown. Trails the highest END-OF-DAY balance (not intraday equity). Once MLL reaches starting balance, it locks permanently. Breaching IS a rule violation. Example: $50K account, make $500 day 1 → balance $50,500, MLL moves to $48,500. Lose $500 day 2 → balance $50,000, MLL stays at $48,500.
rules.calculation_note: CRITICAL: Trails highest END-OF-DAY BALANCE, not real-time equity. The floor only moves up at session close (5PM CT), never intraday.

rules.description: Maximum number of standard contracts allowed simultaneously. Micro contracts at 10:1 ratio.
Must trade within CME exchange hours. Session: Sunday 5:00 PM CT - Friday 4:00 PM CT. Daily break: 4:00 PM - 5:00 PM CT.
